import io
import string

fn capitalize(_ w: String) -> String
  match string.byte_at(w, 0)
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper = string.from_byte(b - 32)
      let rest = string.substring(w, 1, string.len(w))
      "#{upper}#{rest}"
    else
      w
    end
  when None
    w
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
let n = words.len()
while i < n
  match words.get(i)
  when Some(w)
    let cap = capitalize(w)
    if i == 0
      result = cap
    else
      result = "#{result} #{cap}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
